query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM companies) as total_companies,
  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT companyId) FROM assets) as companies_with_assets,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM assets) as total_asset_records

  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM companies) as total_companies,
  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT companyId) FROM assets) as companies_with_assets,
